memoryArtifacts.headline: Agnes Von Saarbrucken
memoryArtifacts.description:
Agnes von Saarbrücken (* um 1115; † nach 1147) war die Tochter des Grafen Friedrich I. von Saarbrücken und Herzogin von Schwaben.[1]


Kirche Sankt Walburga in Walbourg
Sie heiratete um 1132/33 Herzog …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Saarbrücken於大約1115年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯時，她的父親Friedrich von Saarbrücken21歲，母親Gisèle de Lorraine26歲。她於1135年與Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1147年在德國爾特波格格皮根霍恩斯陶分享年33歲，埋葬在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾沃爾布格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Saarbrücken was born about 1115, in Saarbrücken, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Friedrich von Saarbrücken, was 21 and her mother, Gisèle de Lorraine, was 26. She married Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben in 1135. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1147, in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 33, and was buried in Walbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Saarbrücken est née environ 1115, à Kreis Saarbrücken, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Friedrich von Saarbrücken, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Lorraine, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1147, à Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Walbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

de.Staufen im Breisgau, Breisgau-Hochschwar: Staufen im Breisgau, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Saarbrücken um 1115 in Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich von Saarbrücken 21 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Lorraine 26. Sie hat 1135 Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1147 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Walburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Saarbrücken è nata il circa 1115 nel Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Friedrich von Saarbrücken, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Lorraine, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1147, nel Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Walbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Saarbrücken(이)가 대략 1115년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레이스 사아르브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich von Saarbrücken(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Lorraine(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1135년 Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 독일 wu르테버그 그o핀겐 호헨스타펜에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 월보우르그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Saarbrücken nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Friedrich von Saarbrücken, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Lorraine, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1147, em Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Walbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Saarbrücken родилась около 1115 г. в местности крис саарбрuккен, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Friedrich von Saarbrücken было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Lorraine, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben в 1135 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1147 г. в местности хохенстауфен, гoппинген, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности валбург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция.

Se casó con Friedrich II. 'der Einäugige' Herzog von Schwaben en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1147, en Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Walbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.
